creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
With 13.1-RELEASE not yet released …

At, for example, <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zpool-features&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD+13.1-RELEASE> (13.1-RELEASE): 

* the second of the four pull-down menus defaults to 
  FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE and Ports

* the footer suggests using a URL that is similarly inconsistent. 

Please have the menu and footer prepared for release. Thanks.
